case_title: DIAMOND WEST ASSOCIATES et al VS BUTLER ANITA et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DIAMOND WEST ASSOCIATES GREEN GEORGE AGENT IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BUTLER ANITA WILLIAMS ISSAC 750 O'FARRELL APT.107, S.F, CA 94109 SEE ATTACHED FOR DETAILS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
